listEvents.usage:
val scopes = listOf(OAuthScope.CHATS_READ)
val filter = EventFilter()
val response = client.events.listEvents(isActive = true, scopes = scopes, filter = filter)

createUpload.usage:
val request = UploadRequest(file = ByteArray(0), contentDisposition = "example")
client.uploads.createUpload(request = request)
